servicesSection.title: Ways out of the Debt Trap

clusters.headline: Out-of-Court Settlement
clusters.title: Debt-free without insolvency
clusters.content: Negotiating with creditors for the best possible result without court proceedings. We handle all correspondence for you.

clusters.headline: Private Insolvency
clusters.title: Regulated Debt Discharge
clusters.content: Legal process according to InsO. Achieve complete debt freedom after just three years by complying with all requirements.

clusters.headline: Keep Your Property
clusters.title: Home Protection Despite Debt
clusters.content: We reduce debt and installments so that you can keep your home permanently. Act quickly against foreclosures.

clusters.headline: Garnishment Help
clusters.title: Immediate Aid for Blocks
clusters.content: Immediate support for account and wage garnishment. Setting up P-Accounts and checking garnishment exemption limits.

items.title: Initial Contact
items.description: Contact us via form or phone. We review your options and get back to you by the next business day at the latest.

items.title: Free Consultation
items.description: Non-binding analysis (phone, video, or in-office). You will receive an individual solution proposal for your situation.

items.title: Negotiations
items.description: We handle all communication, obtain actual claim amounts, and conduct out-of-court settlement negotiations.

items.title: Debt Relief
items.description: After successful negotiations, you pay adjusted installments. The end result is debt freedom or a §305 InsO certificate.
